name: Function Call With Incorrect Argument Type
description: The product calls a function with an argument of the wrong data type. This is most common in loosely typed languages or where variable argument types cannot be enforced at compile time, potentially resulting in type confusion vulnerabilities.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM[function_call] node provides arguments whose types do not match the META[function_signature] type expectations of the target TRANSFORM[callee] or EXTERNAL node, causing implicit conversion or undefined behavior
